name: Yuhuan

skills.name: Poignant Melodies
skills.description:
Changes the melody to produce different skill effects.
War: Skills deal damage to nearby enemies.
Peace: Skills heal nearby allies.

skills.name: Tragic Beauty
skills.description: Damages and slows nearby targets. Her next Basic Attack will deal more damage.

skills.name: Mournful Tempo
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed, and after a brief delay, inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

skills.name: Melody of Peace
skills.description: Changes the melody to Peace, in which skills restore Health to nearby allies.

tips: Yuhuan (Mage): Tier B on international ranked — 50.64% WR.
Build core: Knowledge Gem, Guardian - Starspring, Boots of the Arcane.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.64%, pick 0.47%, ban 0.02%, popularity tier B.
Counters Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong · Weak into Luna, Ying.

faqs.question: Is Yuhuan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yuhuan is Tier B Mage with 50.64% win rate, 0.47% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Yuhuan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Knowledge Gem, Guardian - Starspring, Boots of the Arcane, Holy Grail, Ominous Premonition, Eye of the Phoenix. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Yuhuan?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Yuhuan: Luna, Ying. Yuhuan is strong into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong. Countered by: Luna, Ying.
